name: TYPEFORM-VOICE-AI-CONSULTATION-001: Typeform to Voice AI Integration v1

nodes.name: Parse Typeform & Generate Voice AI Context

value.name: ={{ $json.consultationData.name }}
value.status: Typeform Submitted - Awaiting Voice AI Call

messageValues.content: You are a professional automation consultant for Rensto. You're about to conduct a voice consultation call. Use the provided context to personalize your conversation. Be friendly, professional, and focus on understanding their specific needs.

={{ $json.voiceAIContext }}

Generate a personalized consultation script for this customer. Include:
1. Opening greeting (use their name)
2. Acknowledgment of their specific challenges
3. Questions to ask based on their goals
4. Recommendations based on their budget and timeline
5. Next steps

Keep it conversational and natural for voice delivery.

parameters.subject: Your Voice AI Consultation is Ready - Next Steps
parameters.message:
={{ '

Hi ' + $json.consultationData.name + ',

Thank you for completing the consultation form! Your personalized Voice AI consultation is ready.

What Happens Next:

  1. Our Voice AI agent has reviewed your information
  2. Your consultation is personalized based on:
    • Your challenges: ' + $json.consultationData.currentChallenges + '
    • Your goals: ' + $json.consultationData.automationGoals + '
    • Your budget: ' + $json.consultationData.budget + '
    • Your timeline: ' + $json.consultationData.timeline + '
  3. You will receive a call or notification to start your Voice AI consultation

Session ID: ' + $json.consultationData.sessionId + '

We look forward to helping you automate your business!

Best regards,
The Rensto Team

' }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, message: 'Typeform data received and Voice AI consultation prepared', sessionId: $json.consultationData.sessionId, nextStep: 'Voice AI call will be initiated' } }}

main.node: Parse Typeform & Generate Voice AI Context
